last_episode_to_air.name: A Dragon’s Fire
last_episode_to_air.overview: An emergency board meeting puts Ellis' job on the line. A shocking discovery forces Jackson to step up to save the company — and his dad — from disaster.

name: Unstable
overview: A biotech genius tries to bounce back from the depths of grief with help from his son, who works to escape his dad’s shadow and save the family business.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: In season two, Ellis lays out a series of challenges and mind games for Jackson to see if he has what it takes to succeed him as the heir to the Dragon empire, but a newcomer might have other ideas.

episodes.name: Unstable
episodes.overview: Reeling from a tragedy, Ellis struggles to focus at work as a major project looms, forcing Anna to reach out to Ellis' son Jackson for help.

episodes.name: Engaged, Focused and Ridiculously Sane
episodes.overview: After an odd discovery in Ellis' basement, Jackson stays longer in LA and sets boundaries with his dad — which inspires Ellis to stand up to the board.

episodes.name: The Wizard of Odd
episodes.overview: Determined to change the narrative of his life and business, Ellis invites a reporter to shadow him, while Anna tries to make things seem normal at work.

episodes.name: Pilgrims and Sex Parties
episodes.overview: Facing fallout from the Time cover, Ellis fears getting ousted and receives support from an old pal, while Anna uncovers intel to keep the twins at bay.

episodes.name: Beautiful Birthday Bastards
episodes.overview: When the twins threaten to press charges, Anna and Ellis plan a birthday surprise. Jackson and the Red Lab crew head to the bar, where feelings emerge.

episodes.name: The Ballad of Eduardo
episodes.overview: A call from an old professor puts Jackson in a tough spot. The Red Lab crew faces hard truths. Ellis sets his sights on new heights at his side job.

episodes.name: Roasting For Beginners
episodes.overview: Ellis and Jackson spend the day doing landscaping work until the father-son bonding time turns into a roast. At the house, Leslie wears out his welcome.

episodes.name: A Dragon’s Fire
episodes.overview: An emergency board meeting puts Ellis' job on the line. A shocking discovery forces Jackson to step up to save the company — and his dad — from disaster.

2.name: Season 2
2.overview: In season two, Ellis lays out a series of challenges and mind games for Jackson to see if he has what it takes to succeed him as the heir to the Dragon empire, but a newcomer might have other ideas.
